The '''Council of Elders''' was the ruling body of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]] in the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It comprised several members that thought out issues very thoroughly before making a judgment on them. Open discussion was allowed on matters concerning politics and legal issues, but after a decision, the resolution was finalized and no changes or appeals could be made.

The council decided during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] to not join either the Republic nor the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] for fear of contamination and commercial exploitation of their planet.

Elders included [[Nar-Somo-Dali]] and [[Dorr-Femi-Bonmi]].
